Package com.github.javaparser

Class TokenRange

java.lang.Object
com.github.javaparser.TokenRange
All Implemented Interfaces:
Iterable<JavaToken>
public class TokenRange extends Object implements Iterable<JavaToken>
The range of tokens covered by this node.
